summary: Token key fix verification SUCCESSFUL. Page creation at /pages no longer fails with 401 error. Full E2E test passed: register → login → navigate to /pages → create page → verify in My Pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Token key fix verified in all 7 files:
Root cause was mismatch between api.js using 'blendlink_token' and member-pages components using 'token'
seed_data_creation: Created test page 'Test Page 1770700977' during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Token key mismatch bug is FIXED. All member-pages components now correctly use 'blendlink_token' localStorage key. Page creation flow works correctly - no more 401 errors.

verified_fix.issue: Page creation at /pages failing with 401 Unauthorized
verified_fix.root_cause: memberPagesApi.js and member-pages components used localStorage.getItem('token') instead of localStorage.getItem('blendlink_token')
verified_fix.fix_applied: Changed all 7 files to use 'blendlink_token' key consistently
verified_fix.test_result: SUCCESS - E2E test passed with toast 'Page created! +40 BL Coins'

e2e_test_results.step2_navigate_pages: PASS - Stayed on /pages (not redirected to login)
e2e_test_results.step4_page_creation_api: PASS - No 401 error, success toast shown
e2e_test_results.step5_verify_my_pages: PASS - New page visible in My Pages tab with 'Manage' button
